name: Gmail Assistant Agent
observations: Daily Gmail inbox cleanup agent at ~/.claude/agents/gmail-assistant.md (745 lines)
v3 implemented 2026-03-21 with 17 changes across 4 pillars: Organization, Intelligence, Reliability, Safety
8-step pipeline: pre-flight, category cleanup (promo/social/newsletter), primary classification, follow-up tracking, attention email, summary report, post-run cleanup
9 auto-labels: Financial, Security, Shipping, Social, Newsletters, School, Home, Medical, Work, plus Security-Threat
Features: VIP detection via 90-day reply history, phishing detection (7 signals), delta sync, circuit breaker, batch API, idempotency
Processes chris2ao@gmail.com (personal) and chrisjohnson@cryptoflexllc.com (work)
Scheduled on 5-hour intervals via Claude Code triggers with remote-control daemon
Trigger ID: trig_018km7FBZka2JcYuD5SMQvzf (Personal account)
Environment ID is ephemeral: changes on each bridge restart, requiring auto-sync via bridge-launcher.sh
Bridge-launcher wrapper (added 2026-04-03) auto-updates trigger environment_id on daemon restart
2026-04-09: trigger was silently failing all day due to environment_id mismatch after bridge restart on April 8; fixed by manual trigger update and bridge-launcher.sh hardening

name: Vector Memory System
observations: Layer 1 of 5-layer memory architecture

Hybrid search: vectorWeight 0.7, textWeight 0.3, MMR lambda 0.7
SSE server on Mac port 8765 (launchd: com.cryptoflex.mcp-memory-sse)
Windows connects via SSE with local stdio fallback

name: notebooklm-content-agent
observations: File: ~/.claude/agents/notebooklm-content.md
Model: sonnet
Purpose: Creates branded infographics and slide decks from blog posts using Google NotebookLM
QA reviews output for spelling, accuracy, brand compliance, and format
Uses ~/.claude/scripts/notebooklm.sh wrapper to invoke CLI from dedicated venv
Output directory: ~/GitProjects/cryptoflexllc/content-assets/notebooklm/

DLP (Data Loss Prevention) policy added 2026-04-02: scans for PII (emails, file paths, API keys, phone numbers, workspace metadata) in generated content. PII findings are blocking and force NEEDS REVISION verdict. Allowed identifiers: Chris Johnson, CryptoFlex LLC, cryptoflexllc.com, public GitHub repos.
Migrated from CLI wrapper (notebooklm.sh + notebooklm-py venv) to notebooklm MCP server tools (2026-04-05)
Now uses MCP tools: notebook_list, notebook_create, source_add_text, source_add_url, notebook_query, studio tools, download_artifact
Removed Bash from tools list (no longer needs shell commands for NotebookLM operations)
Old dependencies deprecated and removed: ~/.notebooklm-venv/, ~/.claude/scripts/notebooklm.sh, ~/.notebooklm/

name: notebooklm-content-skill
observations: File: ~/.claude/skills/notebooklm-content/SKILL.md
Invocation: /notebooklm-content <blog-post-slug> [--type infographic|slides|both]
Delegates to notebooklm-content agent
Separate from /blog-post pipeline, invoked independently
Supports infographics (PNG) and slide decks (PDF/PPTX)
Prerequisites updated (2026-04-05): now requires notebooklm MCP server in ~/.claude.json instead of CLI venv
Authentication changed from OAuth (notebooklm.sh login) to cookie-based (nlm login), expires every 2-4 weeks

name: notebooklm-wrapper-script
observations: File: ~/.claude/scripts/notebooklm.sh
Executes notebooklm CLI from dedicated venv at ~/.notebooklm-venv/
All agent/skill invocations use this wrapper, never bare notebooklm

name: bridge-launcher.sh
observations: File: ~/.claude/scripts/bridge-launcher.sh
Wrapper around claude remote-control that auto-updates scheduled trigger environment_id on bridge restart
Background watcher detects new env ID from bridge log, then calls claude -p --model haiku to update trigger via RemoteTrigger tool
State files: ~/.claude/current-env-id (current), ~/.claude/current-env-id.prev (previous, used to skip unchanged updates)
Logs: ~/.claude/logs/bridge-launcher.log
Created: 2026-04-03 to fix silent trigger failures caused by ephemeral environment_id drift
Updated 2026-04-09: upgraded from Haiku to Sonnet for trigger updates, added --bare --allowedTools RemoteTrigger flags
Added 3-retry loop with mandatory GET verification (VERIFIED/FAILED marker pattern) to prevent silent update failures
Added osascript macOS notification on failure after all retries exhausted
Root cause of April 9 failures: Haiku claude -p reported exit 0 without actually executing the RemoteTrigger update tool call

name: com.anthropic.claude-remote-control
observations: File: ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.anthropic.claude-remote-control.plist
Manages the claude remote-control daemon (Mac Mini Bridge)
KeepAlive: true, RunAtLoad: true, ThrottleInterval: 10s
WorkingDirectory: ~/.claude/gmail-assistant-workspace
Calls bridge-launcher.sh wrapper (updated 2026-04-03, previously called claude directly)
Logs: ~/.claude/logs/remote-control.log (stdout), ~/.claude/logs/remote-control.err.log (stderr)

name: /evolve command
observations: File: ~/.claude/commands/evolve.md
Orchestrates Homunculus Evolution Layer: gathers instincts, spawns evolve-synthesizer agent (sonnet), performs semantic clustering, presents candidates for user approval, writes to evolved/ directory
Modes: full (all instincts) or incremental (since last timestamp)
Touches .last-evolve-timestamp after successful run
promote-evolved.sh script copies accepted candidates to active dirs

name: /storage-cleanup command
observations: File: ~/.claude/commands/storage-cleanup.md
Scans Mac storage, identifies cleanup opportunities, and moves safe files to external drive
Three-tier approach: Tier 1 (delete regeneratable caches ~7GB), Tier 2 (move to external drive ~15GB), Tier 3 (settings changes like iMessage retention)
Targets: .next caches, node_modules, Xcode DerivedData, Homebrew cache, Playwright cache, pip/pnpm caches, session archives, iOS DeviceSupport, CoreSimulator, inactive repos

name: vercel-nextjs-debugging skill

name: /dashboard-export command
observations: File: ~/.claude/commands/dashboard-export.md

name: secrets.env
observations: Location: ~/.claude/secrets/secrets.env
Sourced from ~/.zshrc for all Claude Code sessions
Contains API keys for: EXA_API_KEY, FIRECRAWL_API_KEY, OBSIDIAN_API_TOKEN
Environment variables inherit to MCP servers with empty env: {} in .claude.json
Never committed to git, always in .gitignore

name: cryptoflexllc MDX Registry
observations: Two separate MDX component registries in cryptoflexllc codebase
Location 1: blog/[slug]/page.tsx component registry
Location 2: backlog/[slug]/page.tsx component registry
All new MDX components (Mermaid, DiagramLightbox, ImageLightbox, etc.) must be registered in BOTH
Gotcha: forgetting backlog registry causes backlog post rendering failures
Contains: MermaidDiagram, DiagramLightbox, ImageLightbox, LinkedText, Code, Heading, etc.
